---
title: "Econ 216 - EDA"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
library(tidyverse)

main <- read_csv("FARS1975NationalCSV.csv")
aux <- read_csv("FARS1975NationalAuxillaryCSV.csv")


data <- left_join(main, aux, by = "common_id") 
```

```{r}
data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    year = as.numeric(year),
    fatalities = as.numeric(fatalities),
    alcohol_involved = ifelse(alcohol == 1, 1, 0)
  )
```
```{r}
data <- data %>%
  mutate(fatality_rate = fatalities / population * 100000)
```
## Time Trend
```{r}
ggplot(data, aes(x = fatalities)) +
  geom_histogram()
```

## Alcohol vs Fatalities
```{r}
ggplot(data, aes(x = year, y = fatalities)) +
  geom_line()
```

## State Differences
```{r}
ggplot(data, aes(x = alcohol_involved, y = fatalities)) +
  geom_boxplot()
```

##Time of Day
```{r}
ggplot(data, aes(x = hour, y = fatalities)) +
  geom_col()
```

## Age vs Fatalities
```{r}
ggplot(data, aes(x = age, y = fatalities)) +
  geom_point()
```
